content:
Eight heavenly home interiors that embody monastic minimalism

Natural materials, vaulted ceilings and utilitarian furniture feature in this lookbook of monastic interiors, where every room is a sanctuary for minimalist devotees. Typically located in a church compound, a Christian monastery is a building that houses monks or nuns, and their restrained interiors – designed for prayer and contemplation – have become a source

The post Eight heavenly home interiors that embody monastic minimalism appeared first on Dezeen.
